Dear Roisin,

In the meantime, if you have any questions or need assistance with managing your policy, please visit our Member Area at https://www.layahealthcare.ie/memberarea/howtousememberarea.

Thank you for reaching out to us regarding your coverage for pain relief medication at Liffey Pharmacy. Dear Ciara,

Thank you for contacting us regarding your pre-authorisation request for neck strain treatment at Mater Private on or around 28 June 2025. To process your request, we require the following information:

- Consultant name
- Hospital name
- Proposed treatment
- Expected date of treatment

Please ensure all documents are included in your request. Once we have received this information, we will acknowledge receipt and process your request as soon as possible.

Kind regards,
Your Health

Dear Lorcan Murphy,

Your policy number is POL-IE-805483, and your plan is named Corporate Flex.

Best regards,
Your Health Insurance Team

Dear Conor,
